title: ansible Step params
description: Input Contract for the ansible Actuator (charter §2.3). Hand-written — derivation ladder rung 1 (§2.2). v4 adds extraVars: variables passed to ansible-runner as --extra-vars (via env/extravars). Orthogonal to play/scm; this is the landing field for AWX launch extra_vars and survey answers (ADR-0025 survey→params, ADR-0026 /api/v2 façade). play and scm stay mutually exclusive; neither means the built-in gather-facts play.

play.description: Play file content: a YAML sequence of plays (validated as YAML at Prepare). Mutually exclusive with scm.

scm.description: SCM content-ref: clone a repo in the EE pod and run a playbook from it. The clone execs git inside the EE image (GPL boundary, §3); the control plane never fetches content.

repo.description: Clone URL (https:// or ssh://). Private-repo credentials arrive via the Step's credentialRefs, never here (§2.5).

ref.description: Branch, tag, or commit to check out. Empty means the repo default branch.

playbook.description: Playbook path within the repo (e.g. site.yml or playbooks/deploy.yml).

extraVars.description: Extra variables passed to ansible-runner as --extra-vars (written to the runner's env/extravars). The landing field for AWX launch extra_vars and survey answers (§5.6). Never carries secret material (§2.5); credentials stay on credentialRefs.

eeImage.description: Execution-environment image override for this Step's Jobs.

check.description: Run in check mode with diff capture (--check --diff): nothing mutates; changed means would-change — the Baseline drift signal (ADR-0019).
